message:
fix(clippy): lint suppressions + test migration + format string cleanup

- connectors/discord/api: add #[allow(clippy::items_after_statements)]
  on request and request_no_response methods where item definitions
  follow let bindings (idiomatic for the retry closure pattern)
- fcp-raptorq/decode: migrate decode_with_context_roundtrip_orders_symbols
  from #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] to block_on_sync wrapper for
  compatibility with test harness that expects synchronous test entry
- fcp-sdk/error_contract_tests: use Duration::from_secs(5) instead of
  Duration::from_millis(5_000) for clarity, add
  #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on exhaustive error test, use inline
  format args in assertion message

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
